text:
sweet
Orange
Thin slice of artisan wholemeal bread
made with baking powder
EXCEPT kale,
leeks, celery,
asparagus, artichokes
Lentils, peas,
chickpeas,
dried beans
Quinoa
Oat flakes
+
Chicken breast
White fish
(as a replacement and
equivalent to chicken,
once a week)
2 eggs
2 fresh potatoes,
peeled, cooked and cooled
1 apple (peeled if
obstructive symptoms are present)
2 bananas
Regardless of the phase,
5 foods are mandatory
To be consumed every day to ensure proper nutritional intake
as well as the right substrates for the gut microbiota.
Melon
White rice, in all its forms
(flour, noodles, pancakes, …)
without preservatives
Strawberries
Avocado
Fresh spinach leaves
uncooked
Still or sparkling water
Peeled cucumber
Lettuce
Herbal tea
Carrot
Tomato or
cherry tomatoes
1 glass of freshly squeezed
orange juice
Expanded list to all foods allowed in phase 1 +
From week 6:
From week 10:
Pear
Kiwi
Peach
Blueberries
Zucchini
Cauliflower or broccoli
Mushrooms
Sweet bell pepper
PHASE 1
PHASE 2
Which foods MUST and MAY I consume?6
